name: Paycor
description: Payroll, benefits, and HRIS platform used across the organization.

businessContext.purpose: Manage payroll processing, benefits administration, employee records, and tax compliance for all full-time and part-time employees.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Employees cannot be paid; regulatory penalties and employee dissatisfaction. Payroll must run on schedule.

capabilities.name: Payroll Processing
capabilities.description: Calculate and distribute employee compensation

capabilities.name: Benefits Administration
capabilities.description: Manage health, dental, vision, and 401(k) enrollments

capabilities.name: Tax Filing
capabilities.description: Automated federal and state tax withholdings and filings

capabilities.name: Time & Attendance Integration
capabilities.description: Sync hours from time tracking system

name: WelcomeHome
description: Primary CRM for sales, marketing, inquiries, tours, and lead management.

businessContext.purpose: Capture and manage prospective resident leads, track sales pipeline, schedule tours, and support move-in coordination for senior living communities.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Sales team cannot access leads or pipeline data; tour scheduling disrupted; revenue pipeline visibility lost.

capabilities.name: Lead Management
capabilities.description: Capture and track prospective resident inquiries

capabilities.name: Tour Scheduling
capabilities.description: Coordinate community tours with prospects

capabilities.name: Sales Pipeline Tracking
capabilities.description: Monitor deal stages from inquiry to move-in

capabilities.name: Move-In Coordination
capabilities.description: Manage pre-move-in tasks and documentation

name: Move‑N
description: Legacy CRM previously used for sales and marketing workflows; being replaced by WelcomeHome.

businessContext.purpose: Legacy sales and marketing CRM; retained for historical reporting until data migration to WelcomeHome is complete.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Read-only historical data. No operational impact; migration already underway.

capabilities.name: Historical Lead Data
capabilities.description: Archived lead and sales records

name: ECP
description: Clinical and resident onboarding platform supporting care, documentation, and move‑in workflows.

businessContext.purpose: Manage clinical assessments, care plans, medication tracking, and resident health documentation across all care communities.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Clinical staff cannot access care plans or medication records; potential safety risk to residents; regulatory compliance violation.

capabilities.name: Care Planning
capabilities.description: Create and manage individualized resident care plans

capabilities.name: Medication Management
capabilities.description: Track and document medication administration

capabilities.name: Clinical Assessments
capabilities.description: Conduct and record resident health evaluations

capabilities.name: Incident Reporting
capabilities.description: Log and track resident care incidents

name: Azure AD
description: Enterprise identity, authentication, and access management platform.

businessContext.purpose: Provide centralized identity management, single sign-on (SSO), and conditional access policies for all corporate applications and users.
businessContext.impactIfDown: All users locked out of all applications; no authentication possible; complete business paralysis.

capabilities.name: Single Sign-On (SSO)
capabilities.description: Authenticate users across all connected applications

capabilities.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
capabilities.description: Enforce MFA for sensitive applications

capabilities.name: Conditional Access
capabilities.description: Policy-based access control based on user context

capabilities.name: User Lifecycle Management
capabilities.description: Automated provisioning and deprovisioning

name: SharePoint
description: Internal document management, collaboration, and knowledge‑sharing platform.

businessContext.purpose: Store, organize, and share internal documents, policies, and collaborative content across departments and teams.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Teams lose access to shared documents and policies; collaboration halted; workarounds required.

capabilities.name: Document Storage
capabilities.description: Centralized file storage with version history

capabilities.name: Team Sites
capabilities.description: Dedicated collaboration spaces per department

capabilities.name: Policy Repository
capabilities.description: Company-wide policy and procedure documents

capabilities.name: Workflow Automation
capabilities.description: Approval workflows and process automation

name: Corporate Analytics / BI
description: Internal reporting and analytics layer consuming data exports from operational systems.

businessContext.purpose: Aggregate operational data from multiple source systems to provide executive dashboards, operational KPIs, and ad-hoc analytics reporting.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Leadership loses visibility into KPIs and operational metrics; decisions rely on manual data pulls.

capabilities.name: Executive Dashboards
capabilities.description: Key performance indicators for leadership

capabilities.name: Operational Reports
capabilities.description: Daily and weekly operational performance reports

capabilities.name: Ad-hoc Analytics
capabilities.description: Self-service data exploration and querying

capabilities.name: Data Export Scheduling
capabilities.description: Automated data extracts from source systems

name: TalentLMS
description: Cloud-based learning management system used for employee training, compliance, onboarding, and professional development.

businessContext.purpose: Provide a centralized platform for delivering, tracking, and reporting on employee training, compliance courses, and onboarding programs across the organization.
businessContext.impactIfDown: Training delivery and compliance tracking would be delayed. No immediate operational outage, but prolonged downtime could impact regulatory compliance and onboarding timelines.

capabilities.name: Course Management
capabilities.description: Creation, delivery, and organization of training courses and learning paths

capabilities.name: Compliance Training
capabilities.description: Assignment and tracking of mandatory regulatory and policy training

capabilities.name: User & Group Management
capabilities.description: Role-based access, groups, and audience segmentation for learners

capabilities.name: Reporting & Analytics
capabilities.description: Training completion, certification status, and audit-ready reports

capabilities.name: Certifications
capabilities.description: Automated issuance and tracking of training certificates and renewals
